content: Allows shared assets to be loaded to Editables.
Adds the KeyCodes `MouseWheel`, `TrackpadPan`, and `TrackpadPinch` for use in the Input Action System as transformed velocities under the `Direction` action types.
Adds property `ClampMagnitudeToOne` on `Class.InputBinding` to control whether composite direction calculations are clamped.
Adds the `Rotation` property to `Class.Texture` and `Class.Decal` instances to support UV map rotations.
Updates `ComposeDecalAsync` to a `void` function that takes in a `Decal` in input parameters. Only available in the Studio Makeup Beta.
Fixes an issue where skinned meshes could explode when positioned far from the origin.
Fixes an issue where `UITableLayout` sometimes incorrectly sized descendants when `FillEmptySpaceRows` or `FillEmptySpaceColumns` was set to `true`.
Removes invisible sun reflection artifacts on glass when a highlight is applied.
Fixes an issue where trails far from the origin would render with fewer segments and appear low resolution.
Fixes shading with normal maps.
`SpecialMeshes` now correctly show their assigned materials and `MaterialVariants`.
Fixes the incorrect `ParticleEmitter` orientation in `VelocityPerpendicular` mode.
Fixes blurry text rendering caused when `Class.TextLabel.TextSize|TextSize` is set to a non-integer value by a `Class.StyleRule`.
Fixes rendering of transparent avatars with highlights.

In Luau's New Type Solver, allows intersection types that extend the shape of a given Roblox API type. For example, `Accessory & { Handle: BasePart }` is now treated as an `Accessory` extending with a `Handle` property of the type `BasePart`.
Improves accounting of texture memory in the Developer Console.
Fixes an issue where downsampling thin water voxels could cause water to be removed.
Fixes an issue where rapidly changing a part’s `CFrame` could cause incorrect culling.
Fixes potential false culling of parts and characters.
Fixes a crash in autocomplete that could occur when using user-defined type functions to create tables with write-only properties.
Fixes a bug where sometimes calling `StudioTestService:EndTest()` on the first frame of a test session failed to end the test.
Adds support for saving `AnimationGraphEditor` instances (`AssetType::Animation`).
